free_text: Production cross section of isotopes emitted in 70 MeV
alpha-particle interactions on carbon and nitrogen
targets.
An emulsion of C and N nuclei.
*By authors*.An upper limit was estimated within the
limits of our statistical fluctuations because did not
find any C-14 for the carbon target.
Data taken from table
.The cross section value as well as the isotopic
ratios have been fitted with the help of Rudstam's
formula.
S.B
Last checking has been done.
